args: Fix board pane terminals showing identical content (relay grouped-session refactor): when multiple board panes attach to the same tmux session (different windows), all attached relays mirror the same active window because tmux clients in a session always share active-window state. Fix by giving each WebSocket relay its own ephemeral grouped session via tmux new-session -d -s rk-relay-<rand> -t <real_session> per server, then select-window and attach-session against the ephemeral. On WebSocket close, kill-session the ephemeral. On rk serve startup, sweep orphaned rk-relay-* sessions across all known servers.
